{{Quote|Alliance High Command has devised a plan to avenge ''Overlord Ghorin's'' doublecross. We will execute a a series of operations to convince the Empire that it is the ''Emperor'' who is being doublecrossed, not us!|[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar's]] briefing|<ref name="Imperial Pursuit" />}}
'''Operation Grain Snatch''' was the nickname of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] revenge on [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Overlord (Imperial)|Overlord]] [[Ghorin]]. Rebel [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] participated in or commanded many of the operation's missions.

==Prelude==
{{Quote|<nowiki></nowiki>''Supply and Ordnance Command'' has determined that our situation is critical. Our food supply is desperately low.|[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar's]] briefing|<ref name="Imperial Pursuit" />}}
After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] was in desperate need for [[Grain/Legends|grain]]. After dealing with the breakdown of and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] attack on the grain freighter ''[[Op Mus]]'' in the [[Lesser Plooriod Cluster/Legends|Lesser Plooriod Cluster]], the Rebels attacked an Imperial freighter carrying grain. [[Overlord (Imperial)|Overlord]] [[Ghorin]] then presented himself as a defector to the Rebel Alliance and was offering to supply them with Imperial resources at his disposal. The Rebels even engaged in a number of starfighter missions to escort and protect Ghorin's grain shipments from Imperial ships. Unfortunately, this was only a ruse, and Ghorin intended for the Rebels to receive an amount of poisoned grain.

==Revenge==
{{Quote|We received your grain shipments, Ghorin… and the Emperor has sent me here to personally repay you for your treachery.|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], to [[Ghorin]]|audio=GhorinVader-XW.flac|<ref name="Imperial Pursuit" />}}
The Alliance soon discovered the plot and managed to steal Ghorin's [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing starfighters]] in order to direct them later against Imperial supplies. Ghorin's [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]], ''[[Halifax]]'', was disabled above [[Plooriod IV]], where she was boarded by the Rebel [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] [[Storm (Delta-class)|''Storm'']]. Rebel operatives transferred her cargo to ''Storm'', while ''Halifax''´s escorts were captured by shuttle groups [[Lightning (shuttle group)|''Lightning'']], [[Thunder (shuttle group)|''Thunder'']] and ''[[Typhoon]]''. All ships returned to the [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 ''Liberty'' type Star Cruiser]] [[Maria (MC80 Star Cruiser)|''Maria'']], while ''Halifax'' was left behind to be destroyed by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]].

The captured Y-wings were then used to assault Imperial depots in the [[Hollan sector/Legends|Hollan D1 sector]] and [[Geedon V]], among others, in order to discredit Ghorin. Additionally, the Rebels sent a hit and fade strike force consisting of Y-wings, two groups of ''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transports, ''[[Khivan]]'' and ''[[Kaffir]]'', and two [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]], ''[[Talli]]'' and [[Rand (BFF-1 bulk freighter)|''Rand'']], to attack and disable Ghorin's convoy consisting of two [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]], ''[[Grotius]]'' and ''[[Hugo]]'', two [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttles]], and two ''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transports escorted by Y-wings, intending to replace the grain intended for the Imperials, with the poisoned cargo sold to the rebels by Ghorin.

The operation was a success and the Rebels got away with the usable cargo, while the Empire fell into the trap; the frigate [[Elite (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Elite'']] received the tainted grain. Ghorin was assumed a traitor and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] executed him personally in his mansion on [[Plooriod III]].

==Behind the scenes==
The prelude to this event comes from the Operations 6 through 9 of the [[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] expansion, [[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit|''Imperial Pursuit'']]. The remainder is based on Operations 10 through 14.
